title: Riley pirate-river dream — bat-brawl, shield-of-strangers, $140k toll
html:
TL;DR

  • One-paragraph dream fragment from April 2022 starring riley in a "dinky war," paying $140k to a dancer for permission to cross a pirate river.
  • Yahir's role in the dream: clear enemies "Brawl Stars style" with a bat, then retreat behind crowds when danger arrives — a shield of strangers motif.
  • Confirms the riley character as a recurring presence in 2022 dream-imagery (separate from waking-life mentions in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — "Rileybonney - knowing what you want and not settling").
  • Dollar-amount specificity ($140k toll, single dancer) is unusual for a Yahir dream — most dreams are mood-flavored, not transactional.
  • Pairs with the broader 2022 manifesto style tendency to encode personal-mythology into one-line bullets.

Key quote

"In war. But like a dinky one. To cross the pirate river, Riley had to dish out 140k to a dancer for permission. I would eliminate the people with a bat brawl stars style. When I thought danger was coming I would retreat behind other people in a crowd of shield."

Why it matters

A clean exhibit of Yahir's dream as rehearsal mode: the dream casts a real-life friend (riley) as the high-payer / front-line and casts Yahir as the swing-violence/retreating partner. The "shield-of-strangers" instinct is the same instinct that shows up later in the founder-loneliness arc — Yahir hides inside crowds when exposed.

Open questions

  • Who is riley? (Bonney surname per 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream and Nov 2022 dream — likely an OSU/corvallis or friend.)
  • Why "Brawl Stars style"? Was Yahir actively playing the game in spring 2022?
  • The $140k figure — coincidence, or echo of a real OSU-era price tag (tuition + summer + something)?

Wikilinks
